title: ageratina oligocephala
intro: Ageratina oligocephala, also known as Mexican mint hill, is a plant species in the mint family native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ageratina oligocephala include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ageratina oligocephala can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
